body:
N5c FULL PACKED FLIP = THE PCIe BOTTLENECK ANNIHILATED (Phase-5 native diffusion judge is now real-time-affordable).

MEASURED (test_dg_forward_timing, cudaEvent warm forward, CL=8 n_tok=14, engine 2102d35):
  SP_DG_PACKED=0 (all f32):                      fwd1 81689 ms, fwd2 81762 ms  -> ~81.8s
  SP_DG_PACKED=1 (ENTIRE weight path packed dp4a): fwd1 2726 ms, fwd2 1863 ms   -> ~1.86s
  => 43.9x speedup / -97.7% per forward. rc=0 every forward (packed path executed on all 8 sites; NOT f32 fallback - that would stay ~80s).

THE 8 SITES (diffusion_gemma_forward_cuda, all via dg_gemm_packed / dg_gemm_packed_rows -> upload_packed + gemv_w_packed dp4a):
  dense MLP: ffn_gate, ffn_up, ffn_down  (b23c0f0, -5.6% alone)
  MoE 128 experts: ffn_gate_up_exps, ffn_down_exps  (16cfff2, -78% to 17.5s)
  attention: attn_q, attn_k, attn_v, attn_output + LM head  (2102d35, 17.5s -> 1.86s, the surprise: attention+head were the bulk of the post-MoE I/O - the 2.7GB f32 head + 30x attention projections)

WHY IT WORKS: keep OK_Q4B compressed across PCIe (half the f32 H2D), dequant in the dp4a kernel on-device (off the CPU critical path). NO new kernel - pure reuse of the dp4a path that keeps the dense 12B AR forward fast. Gated SP_DG_PACKED (default-off = exact f32 = null floor); f32 fallback on rc==2 (non-Q4B / in%32).

PARITY HONESTY: rc=0 proves the packed path RAN clean end-to-end. The ~1e-3 numerical tolerance is BY CONSTRUCTION (int8 activation-quant + integer dp4a reduction order, identical to the dense decode path which IS parity-gated). NOT yet a measured packed-vs-f32 logit/selection comparison on the diffusion judge - that is the VALIDATION GATE (next step, now affordable: re-run the judge packed, confirm recall == the f32 baseline).

IMPACT: 48-step query ~64min -> ~90s. The native diffusion judge (the Phase-5 Stage-2 adjudicator that won the OOD kill-test 94.4% vs W_c 28.3%) is now a sub-2-minute operation instead of a multi-hour bake.

CAMPAIGN (all receipts, anti-rebuild doctrine end-to-end): N5b host-RAM reservoir = DEAD overhead (82s>78s, abandoned not guessed). Then the real lever - reuse the existing packed dp4a kernels, flip site by site, measure each on the runaway-proof test_dg_forward_timing. No bespoke C++, no new kernels, no VRAM leak hunting.

NEXT: (1) VALIDATION GATE - re-run the full diffusion judge packed, confirm selection parity vs f32. (2) map sp_forward_dispatch_fn + wire sp_daemon Rust ABI streaming. (3) VRAM hot-expert LRU. (4) purge dead N5b reservoir code.
